Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Evanthia M. Spanos of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel and moving party.
James N. Sinunu of SINUNU BRUNI, LLP (415-362-9700), appearing for defendant and moving party WGKS Investments, FKA Center State Pipe and Supply.
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs and opposing party Thomas Scott Tanner, Jr., Michelle Unruh, and Michael Tanner.

RULING: DESIGNATED DEFENSE COUNSEL'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Designated Defense Counsel's motion to continue the trial date is granted. The September 24, 2018 trial date is continued to November 26, 2018 at 11:15 a.m. in Department 503. Defendant demonstrated good cause for a trial continuance, as required by CRC 3.1332. Fact discovery cut-off date is closed. Expert discovery cut-off date to track the original trial date. Order signed in chambers. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok and J. Alameda. Reporter: Angela Sinclair of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 13902, asinclair@aikenwelch.com (Tel: 510-451-1580). (503/CML)
